# config.yaml.template

**Path:** python/dbkit/config/postgres/config.yaml.template
**Syntax:** text
**Generated:** 2026-04-16 10:47:57

```
# dbkit - PostgreSQL connection configuration template
#
# This file is used by the dbkit setup script to generate
# ~/.config/dev-utils/config.yaml with your connection details.
# Do not edit this file directly — run setup.py instead.
#
# Passwords are handled by ~/.pgpass — never put credentials here.
# See: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/current/libpq-pgpass.html

dbkit:
  host: DBKIT_HOST
  port: DBKIT_PORT
  dbname: DBKIT_DBNAME
  user: DBKIT_USER
```
